case_title: EMILY CARDENAS VS. INTERNATIONAL COLLEGE OF COSMETOLOGY 11 et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION REGARDING OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARDENAS, EMILY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-23-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-07-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-23-2008 CONTINUED TO JUN-11-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). APR-23-2008 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
